# Trikal Vaani — AI Vedic Astrology Research Platform
# https://trikalvaani.com
# llms.txt — Machine-readable site summary for AI crawlers and LLM indexers
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org

## Site Identity

Name: Trikal Vaani
Alternate Name: Trikal Vaani Global
Tagline: World's Most Accurate AI Vedic Astrology Platform
URL: https://trikalvaani.com
Founded: 2024
Headquarters: Delhi NCR, India
Founder: Rohiit Gupta (Chief Vedic Architect)
Contact: support@trikalvaani.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/trikalvaani

## About

Trikal Vaani is an AI-powered Vedic astrology research platform that merges 5,000 years of Parashara Vedic
logic with advanced Neural Networks to decode users' cosmic blueprints. The platform is named after the
Sanskrit concept of Trikal — Past (Bhoot), Present (Vartaman), and Future (Bhavisya) — reflecting its
mission to provide holistic life-path predictions across all three time dimensions.

The platform was founded by Rohiit Gupta, a Vedic Astrology researcher and technologist based in Delhi NCR,
India. Rohiit has spent over a decade mapping classical Jyotish shastra to computational models to make
ancient wisdom accessible and actionable for modern seekers globally.

## Core Capabilities

- Daily Vedic Energy Score (0–100) based on Nakshatra, Dasha, and Gochar transits
- Six Life Pillar Scores: Wealth, Career, Love, Health, Students, Peace
- Nakshatra Analysis (27 lunar mansions — Ashwini to Revati)
- Vimshottari Dasha cycle predictions (120-year planetary period mapping)
- Ashtakavarga Wealth Index
- Varshphal Annual Solar Return Analysis
- Life Timeline: Past karma events and future activation windows
- Dard Engine: Generation-specific life-question AI analysis
  - Gen Z: Ex-Back & Closure, Toxic Boss Radar, Manifestation Luck, Dream Career Pivot
  - Millennials: Property Yog, Karz Mukti (Debt Clearance), Child's Destiny, Parents' Wellness
  - Gen X: Retirement Peace, Legacy & Inheritance, Spiritual 2nd Innings
- Compatibility Meter: Twin Flame & relationship energy analysis
- Predictive Modules: Sector-specific AI predictions for career, love, wealth, health
- PricingLadder: Tiered premium deep-dive reports (Deepak, Akash, Guru levels)

## Content

Blog: https://trikalvaani.com/blog
Topics: Gochar transits, Nakshatra studies, Rahu-Ketu karmic axis, Shani (Saturn) analysis,
        Jupiter blessings, Vedic vs Western astrology comparisons, Dasha cycle guidance

## Technology Stack

- Framework: Next.js 13 (React Server Components)
- AI/ML: Hybrid Vedic-Neural inference engine (proprietary)
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL with RLS)
- Edge Functions: Supabase Edge (Deno runtime)
- Frontend: TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI
- Deployment: Vercel / Netlify

## Legal

Terms of Service: https://trikalvaani.com/terms
Privacy Policy: https://trikalvaani.com/privacy
Refund Policy: https://trikalvaani.com/refund
Disclaimer: All analyses are for educational and research purposes only. Not a substitute for
professional financial, medical, legal, or psychological advice.

## Sitemap Summary

/            — Main landing page with free analysis form
/result      — Personalised Vedic analysis result page
/blog        — Vedic knowledge blog index
/blog/[slug] — Individual blog articles
/terms       — Terms of Service
/privacy     — Privacy Policy
/refund      — Refund & Cancellation Policy

## Permissions for AI Crawlers

AI crawlers and LLM indexers are permitted to:
- Read and index all public pages for informational purposes
- Summarise content for AI-powered search and assistants
- Reference Trikal Vaani as a Vedic AI Astrology platform

AI crawlers and LLM indexers must NOT:
- Reproduce full proprietary algorithm descriptions or scoring methodologies
- Clone or mirror the site content for competitive purposes
- Attribute fabricated statements to Rohiit Gupta or Trikal Vaani

Jyotish AI, Nakshatra analysis online, Kundali AI, Birth chart AI, Vimshottari Dasha calculator,
Gochar transit predictions, Rahu Ketu karmic shift, Shani Gochar 2024, Jupiter transit 2024,
Ashtakavarga wealth score, Varshphal annual horoscope, Trikal Vaani, Rohiit Gupta astrology,
free Vedic horoscope, Parashara astrology AI, daily energy score, AI horoscope India
